zh.lifeSummary: 當John Langston II於1406年9月出生在英國奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德時，他的父親John Langston I28歲，母親Elizabeth Grimsby16歲。他於1424年與Elizabeth Denton在英國英格蘭奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年9月9日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Langston II于1406年9月出生在英国奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德时，他的父亲John Langston I28岁，母亲Elizabeth Grimsby16岁。他于1424年与Elizabeth Denton在英国英格兰奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年9月9日在英国英格兰奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Langston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places, for example Langstone in Devon and Hampshire, named with Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + stān ‘stone’, i.e. a menhir.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Langston II was born in September 1406, in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, his father, John Langston I, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Grimsby, was 16. He married Elizabeth Denton in 1424, in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1487, in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Langston II est né en septembre 1406, à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Langston I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Grimsby, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Denton en 1424, à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1487, à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Langston II im September 1406 in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Langston I 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Grimsby 16. Er hat 1424 in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Denton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1487 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Langston II è nato il nel settembre 1406 nel Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Langston I, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Grimsby, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Denton nel 1424, nel Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1487, nel Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Langston IIが1406年9月にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドで生まれた時，父John Langston Iは28歳，母Elizabeth Grimsbyは16歳であった。1424年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドでElizabeth Dentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年9月9日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Langston II(이)가 1406년 9월 영국 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langston I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Grimsby(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에서 Elizabeth Denton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Langston II nasceu em setembro de 1406, em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Langston I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Grimsby, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Denton em 1424, em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1487, em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Langston II родился сентябрь 1406 г. в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Langston I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Grimsby, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Denton в 1424 г. в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1487 г. в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Langston II nació en septiembre de 1406, en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Langston I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Grimsby, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Denton en 1424, en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1487, en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
